summary: Learn Pillar Audit - Iteration 202: All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend testing confirmed Learn page loads correctly with pet content, category pills open correct modals (PathFlowModal for Foundations/Behaviour/Training/Enrichment, LearnContentModal for Tricks/Bundles/etc), dimension cards with 'Start Mojo's path' open PathFlowModal, mobile view (375px) renders cleanly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learn Pillar Audit complete. All features working: 1) Login works, 2) /api/pets/my-pets returns 8 pets in <2s, 3) breed-products fix working (shih tzu returns 77+ products, indie returns 78+ products), 4) service_desk tickets have pet_breed filled, 5) Learn page loads with pet content, 6) Category pills open correct modals (PathFlowModal for guided paths, LearnContentModal for others), 7) Dimension cards open PathFlowModal, 8) Mobile view clean, 9) Locked pillars (Celebrate, Dine, Care, Go, Play) still working.
tests_passed: /api/service_desk/attach_or_create_ticket with pillar=learn creates ticket with pet_breed filled
Learn page /learn loads without 'no pets' state
Foundations pill opens PathFlowModal (New Puppy Start for Mojo, Step 1 of 3)
Tricks & Fun pill opens LearnContentModal with products
Bundles pill opens LearnContentModal with bundle products
Dimension cards with 'Start Mojo's path' open PathFlowModal
Mobile (375px) Learn page renders cleanly - no overflow, readable fonts
PathFlowModal shows pet name (Mojo), breed (Indie), step counter (Step 1 of 3)
Locked pillars (Celebrate, Dine, Care, Go, Play) still load correctly

features_verified.pill_to_product_modal_fallback: Working - Tricks/Bundles/Soul Made/Mira Picks open LearnContentModal
features_verified.dimension_card_guided_paths: Working - Cards with 'Start Mojo's path' open PathFlowModal
features_verified.breed_products_fix: Working - Space/underscore regex fix returns correct products
features_verified.service_desk_pet_breed: Working - Tickets auto-fill pet_breed from pet_id
features_verified.mobile_responsive: Working - 375px view clean with no overflow
